reason: Backend quality checklist and RP runtime spec index for verification.
Verify branch/turn identity propagation and branch-aware reads remain exact.
Verify immutable snapshot compile/pin behavior and no config drift.
Verify Runtime Workspace remains durable turn-material store, not story truth.
Verify typed Runtime Workspace material kinds, rule-card sidecar selection, and packet/debug provenance boundaries.
Verify event persistence stays trace/invalidation only and preserves full identity.
Verify branch visibility and lineage-aware filtering are preserved.
Verify fact/view separation and deterministic read manifest behavior.
Verify retrieval card usage/promotion behavior matches the frozen contract.
Verify worker memory permissions and governed writes stay aligned with snapshot policy.
Verify direct edit and governed mutation still share one kernel.
Verify trace/invalidation spine stays lightweight and exact-identity scoped.
Verify layer ownership and materialization boundaries remain intact.
Verify projection refresh metadata, source refs, and freshness rules.
Verify stale base revisions are rejected and user edits cannot be overwritten.
Primary task contract and acceptance criteria for review.
Authoritative execution plan, slice order, concurrency limit, and main-brain rules that check work must validate against.
Verify module ownership, freeze list, and sequential integration boundaries.
Verify identity, branch, snapshot, and control-history schema consistency.
Verify Turn/Workspace/Job/Trace contracts and settlement logic stay consistent.
Verify worker registry and scheduler contracts are not duplicated or hardcoded.
Verify packet boundaries and canonical packet contracts remain single-source.
Verify WritingWorker finalize boundary, rewrite adoption, and discussion semantics.
Verify retrieval usage schema, short-id/material-id split, and bounded retrieval rules.
Verify creation-time obligations, governance ordering, and deferred/settled semantics.
Verify rollback/branch semantics, receipts, and active-branch linear view behavior.
Verify adapter policy, support matrix, debug surfaces, and migration/testing scope.
Review against the external spec critique and ensure high/medium findings were actually closed.
Verify runtime config control plane, snapshot publish, and control-history changes against second-stage contract.
Verify Story Evolution, Archival version/reindex governance, and visibility changes against second-stage contract.
Verify longform chapter bridge and review/adoption adapter behavior against second-stage contract.
Verify roleplay/TRPG extension slots, sidecars, and mode-profile behavior against second-stage contract.
Verify phase-Q product acceptance purpose, boundaries, and scenario requirements.
Verify phase-Q acceptance scenarios, product wiring, and manual QA contract.
Verify phase-Q manual QA checklist and expected runtime inspect evidence.
Verify Phase-S product QA correction, product wiring requirements, and writer constraint closure scope.
Verify Phase-S implementation split, test requirements, and product acceptance rerun boundaries.
Verify Phase-T structured outline, beat cursor, one-segment-one-beat, and chapter summary provider requirements.
Verify Phase-T implementation split, tests, ownership, and no future-feature overreach.
